stemHtml:
Refer to figure or CAP 698 Figure 4.28.
Given the following information

Estimated Landing Mass: 45 000 kg
Aerodrome Pressure Altitude: 4000 ft
Flap setting: 30°
Runway: dry, no slope
Headwind Component: 20 kt
Anti skid: INOPERATIVE
Spoilers: AUTOMATIC
Air conditioning: AUTO

For a commercially operated turbo jet powered aeroplane Performance Class A, what is the field length?
